product_overview: I-NEED-HELP Triage Assistant & Registry is a web app for doctors to perform rapid heart-failure triage using the I-NEED-HELP criteria and record patient follow-up outcomes. It also serves as a research-ready clinical registry with personal dashboard analytics and admin export tools.
core_goals: Help doctors triage heart-failure patients quickly and receive an immediate REFER or CONTINUE GDMT recommendation.
Capture baseline clinical characteristics, comorbidities, labs, and GDMT status for research-ready registry records.
Track 30-day patient outcomes and follow-up status over time.
Give doctors a personal dashboard with triage and GDMT audit statistics.
Allow admins to manage doctor accounts and export registry data for analysis.

features.name: Doctor Registration
features.description: A doctor can create an account by providing identity, institution details, and research consent before starting triage work.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill in name, email, and password -> Select institution type and optionally provide institution name -> Read the full consent statement -> Check the consent box -> Submit the registration form -> See that the account is created and pending approval
Navigate to /register -> Leave consent or institution type incomplete -> Submit the registration form -> See inline validation errors

features.name: Doctor Login
features.description: An existing doctor can sign in with email and password to access the application.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill in email and password -> Submit the login form -> See the dashboard or a pending-approval screen depending on account status
Navigate to /login -> Enter invalid credentials -> Submit the login form -> See an inline error banner

features.name: Personal Dashboard & GDMT Audit
features.description: A signed-in doctor can review personal registry stats, enrollment trends, recent patients, and GDMT adherence indicators.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View summary statistics, enrollment chart, recent patients, GDMT audit, and pending follow-up reminders
Navigate to /dashboard -> Select the option to view all patients -> Go to the patient list
Navigate to /dashboard -> Select the option to update pending follow-ups -> Go to the follow-up tracker

features.name: I-NEED-HELP Triage Wizard
features.description: A doctor can record a new patient’s baseline clinical profile, then complete the nine I-NEED-HELP criteria to generate a triage score and recommendation.
user_flows: Navigate to /triage/new -> Fill in patient initials, age, gender, vitals, comorbidities, optional labs, and current GDMT status -> Continue to the scoring step -> Check applicable I-NEED-HELP criteria -> Review the live score update -> Submit the triage form -> See the triage result and recommendation
Navigate to /triage/new -> Leave required baseline fields incomplete -> Try to continue to the scoring step -> See inline validation errors

features.name: Triage Result & Recommendation
features.description: A doctor can review the computed triage score, the criteria that were met, the GDMT status, and the clinical recommendation after submission.
user_flows: Navigate to /triage/new -> Complete and submit a triage assessment -> View the score, met criteria, GDMT status, and REFER or CONTINUE GDMT recommendation
Navigate to /triage/[id]/result -> Review the triage result details -> Print the result for record keeping
Navigate to /triage/[id]/result -> Choose to set follow-up -> Go to the outcome tracking flow
Navigate to /triage/[id]/result -> Choose to start a new triage -> Return to the triage intake flow

features.name: Patient List, Search & Filter
features.description: A doctor can browse their patient registry, search by initials, filter by triage outcome category, and move through pages of results.
user_flows: Navigate to /patients -> Search by patient initial -> See the list narrow to matching patients
Navigate to /patients -> Select a filter for referred, continue GDMT, pending follow-up, or full GDMT patients -> See the list update to that category
Navigate to /patients -> Open a patient card -> View the patient detail page
Navigate to /patients -> Move to the next or previous page -> See another set of patients

features.name: Patient Detail, Edit, Delete, Finalize, Retriage
features.description: A doctor can inspect a patient’s full record, update baseline details before finalization, lock the record, delete it, or create a new triage event for the same patient.
user_flows: Navigate to /patients -> Open a patient record -> Review the triage result, outcome, and audit trail
Navigate to /patients/[id] -> Choose to edit the patient baseline data -> Change the fields -> Save the updates -> See the revised patient record
Navigate to /patients/[id] -> Choose to finalize the record -> Confirm finalization -> See the record become locked for further edits
Navigate to /patients/[id] -> Choose to delete the patient -> Confirm deletion -> See the patient removed from the registry
Navigate to /patients/[id] -> Choose to retriage the patient -> Complete a new I-NEED-HELP assessment -> See a new triage event added to the record
Navigate to /patients/[id] -> Expand the audit trail -> Review create, update, and finalize history

features.name: Follow-up / Outcome Tracking
features.description: A doctor can record or update a patient’s 30-day outcome, including hospitalization, referral, death, or loss to follow-up, with date details when relevant.
user_flows: Navigate to /followup -> Review patients needing follow-up and those already completed -> Switch between the pending and done tabs
Navigate to /followup -> Open a patient’s follow-up update flow -> Record the outcome status -> Save the outcome
Navigate to /followup -> Open a patient’s follow-up update flow -> Enter admission and discharge dates -> Save the outcome after validating the date order
Navigate to /followup -> Open a patient’s follow-up update flow -> Provide a reason when a recommended referral was not followed -> Save the outcome

features.name: Settings - Profile, Change Password, Ethical Clearance, Delete Account
features.description: A signed-in doctor can manage their profile details, change their password, save ethical clearance information, or permanently delete their account and associated patient data.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> Review profile information -> Update ethical clearance number and date -> Save the changes
Navigate to /settings -> Enter current password, new password, and confirmation -> Submit the password change -> See the password updated and other sessions revoked
Navigate to /settings -> Enter mismatched passwords or a short new password -> Submit the form -> See inline validation errors
Navigate to /settings -> Choose to delete the account -> Confirm the deletion by typing the required phrase -> Permanently remove the account and patient data

features.name: Admin - Approve Doctors & Reset Passwords
features.description: An admin can review doctor accounts, approve pending registrations, and force-reset another doctor’s password.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/users -> Review the doctor account list -> Approve a pending doctor account -> See the account marked as approved
Navigate to /admin/users -> Select another doctor’s account -> Reset that doctor’s password -> Copy the temporary password shown once -> Provide the password to the doctor out of band

features.name: Admin - Research Data Export
features.description: An admin can view registry summary counts and download the research database as CSV for analysis.
user_flows: Navigate to /export -> Review registry summary statistics -> Download one dataset as CSV
Navigate to /export -> Review registry summary statistics -> Download all datasets together as CSV files

tech_stack: better-auth (email/password sessions, rate limiting, admin-managed accounts)
Vitest (unit tests for triage scoring engine)

routes.description: Splash/redirect screen that sends signed-in users to /dashboard and everyone else to /login
Doctor self-registration with institution type, consent checkbox, and regulatory disclosure
Personal stats (total patients, referral rate, GDMT compliance, pending follow-ups), 6-month enrollment chart, recent patients, GDMT audit, pending follow-up reminders
Two-step wizard - Step 1 patient profile/vitals/comorbidities/labs/GDMT status, Step 2 the 9-criterion I-NEED-HELP checklist with live score
Shows the triage score, REFER vs CONTINUE_GDMT recommendation, criteria met, GDMT status, and clinical guidance; can print
Patient detail with triage result, outcome, audit trail, edit/delete/finalize/retriage actions
Edit a patient's baseline data (locked once the record is finalized)
Record/update the 30-day clinical outcome (stable/hospitalized/referred/deceased/lost-to-followup) with admission/discharge dates
Re-run the I-NEED-HELP checklist for an existing patient to log a new triage event
List of all patients needing vs. already having a follow-up outcome, tabbed pending/done
ADMIN-only research data export - download the full registry as CSV (patients/triage/outcomes)
ADMIN-only doctor account management - approve pending sign-ups and force-reset another doctor's password (temp password shown once)
Profile info, change-own-password, ethical clearance number/date, delete-own-account (with patient data)

features.name: Doctor Registration
features.description: A new doctor signs up with name, email, password, institution type/name, and must check a regulatory consent box. New accounts are created unapproved.
user_interactions: Fill name, email, password fields
Select institution type from dropdown, optionally type institution name
Expand and read the full consent statement
Check the consent checkbox
Click "Daftar & Mulai Triase" to submit
See inline validation error if consent or institution type is missing

features.name: Doctor Login
features.description: Email/password sign-in for an existing doctor account
user_interactions: Fill email and password
Toggle password visibility
Click "Masuk" to submit
See an inline error banner on invalid credentials

features.name: Pending-Approval Gate
features.description: Doctors whose account has not yet been approved by an admin are blocked from every page except login/register/settings/privacy/terms, and see a "Menunggu Persetujuan Admin" screen instead.
user_interactions: Log in as a freshly-registered (unapproved) doctor
Get redirected/blocked on any non-allow-listed route
Click "Keluar" to log out from the pending screen

features.name: I-NEED-HELP Triage Wizard
features.description: Two-step intake that records a patient's baseline profile then scores the 9 I-NEED-HELP criteria to recommend REFER (score >= 1) or CONTINUE_GDMT (score 0)

user_interactions.Step 1: fill patient initial, age, gender, NYHA class, vitals (systolic/diastolic BP, heart rate, LVEF), comorbidities, optional labs (eGFR, NT-proBNP), current GDMT medications

user_interactions: Click "Lanjut ke Skor I-NEED-HELP" (blocked with inline errors if required fields are missing)

user_interactions.Step 2: check any of the 9 I-NEED-HELP criteria (I, N, E1, E2, D, H, E3, L, P), see live score update

user_interactions: Click "Lihat Hasil Triase" to submit

features.name: Triage Result & Recommendation
features.description: Displays the computed score, REFER/CONTINUE_GDMT banner, which criteria were met, GDMT pillar status, and PERKI-guideline-based clinical recommendations
user_interactions: View the result banner, score, and met criteria
Click "Set Follow-up" to go set an outcome
Click "Triase Baru" to start another triage
Click "Cetak Hasil" to print

features.name: Patient List, Search & Filter
features.description: Browse all of a doctor's own patients with search by initial and filters for referred/continue-GDMT/pending-followup/full-GDMT, paginated 20 per page
user_interactions: Type in the search box to filter by patient initial
Click a filter chip (Semua/Rujukan/Lanjut GDMT/Perlu Follow-up/GDMT Lengkap)
Click a patient card to open detail
Click Prev/Next to paginate

features.name: Patient Detail, Edit, Delete, Finalize, Retriage
features.description: View full patient record with triage/outcome/audit history; edit baseline data (only before finalization); permanently lock the record; delete the patient; or run a new triage event
user_interactions: Click Edit to change baseline fields (disabled once finalized)
Click Finalize, confirm, to lock the record permanently
Click Delete, confirm, to permanently remove the patient and all related data
Click Retriage to log a new I-NEED-HELP assessment for the same patient
Expand the audit trail to see create/update/finalize history

features.name: Follow-up / Outcome Tracking
features.description: Record a patient's 30-day clinical outcome (stable/hospitalized/referred/deceased/lost-to-followup) with admission/discharge dates and a not-referred reason when applicable
user_interactions: Switch between "Belum Follow-up" and "Selesai" tabs
Click Update/Edit on a patient row to set or change the outcome status
Provide a reason when a REFER recommendation was not actually followed

features.name: Personal Dashboard & GDMT Audit
features.description: Doctor's own stats - total patients, referral rate, GDMT compliance rate, pending follow-up count, 6-month enrollment trend chart, per-drug GDMT adherence bars
user_interactions: View summary stat cards
View the monthly enrollment bar chart
Click "Lihat Semua" to go to the full patient list
Click "Update Sekarang" on the pending-followup banner

features.name: Settings - Profile, Change Password, Ethical Clearance, Delete Account
features.description: View profile info, change own password (revokes other sessions), save/edit ethical clearance number and date, or permanently delete the account and all its patient data
user_interactions: Fill current password, new password, confirm new password, click "Simpan Password Baru"
See inline error if new password is under 8 chars, confirmation mismatches, or current password is wrong
Fill/save ethical clearance number and date
Click "Hapus Akun Saya", confirm, type "HAPUS AKUN SAYA" to permanently delete the account

features.name: Admin - Approve Doctors & Reset Passwords
features.description: ADMIN-only page listing every doctor account; approve a pending sign-up with one click, or force-reset another doctor's password (a one-time temp password is shown, all of that doctor's sessions are revoked). An admin cannot reset their own password here (must use Settings) and cannot be force-approved (always implicitly allowed).
user_interactions: Click "Setujui" on a pending doctor's row
Click "Reset Password" on another doctor's row (not shown for your own row), confirm, copy the shown temp password
Non-admin users attempting to visit this route are redirected to /dashboard

features.name: Admin - Research Data Export
features.description: ADMIN-only CSV export of the full pseudoanonymized registry (patients, triage scores/criteria, outcomes) for statistical analysis
user_interactions: View registry summary stats (total patients, referrals, with-outcome, full-GDMT)
Click a dataset's "Unduh" button or "Unduh Semua Dataset Sekaligus" to download CSV

features.name: Client-side Error Reporting
features.description: Render-time errors (error.tsx/global-error.tsx) and event-handler/async/unhandled-promise-rejection errors (window listeners) are forwarded to a logging endpoint so they're visible server-side instead of only in the user's own browser console
user_interactions: Trigger a render error and see a friendly "Terjadi Kesalahan" fallback with a "Coba Lagi" retry button

known_limitations.issue: Rate limiting (better-auth, sign-in/sign-up/change-password capped at 3 attempts/10s) uses in-memory storage
known_limitations.impact: Per-serverless-instance only on Vercel, not a hard global cap under sustained/distributed brute-force load
A locked-out doctor must be reset manually by an admin and told the temp password out-of-band (e.g. WhatsApp); there is no self-service "forgot password" email link

known_limitations.issue: /api/log-client-error is unauthenticated by necessity, throttled only by a simple per-IP in-memory counter (20/min)
known_limitations.impact: Same per-instance-memory caveat as the auth rate limiter; freeform attacker-controlled text can still reach server logs within the throttle window

known_limitations.issue: Pending-approval allow-list matching uses path-prefix comparison
known_limitations.impact: A future route whose path begins with an allowed prefix (e.g. something starting with "/settings") would be unintentionally reachable pre-approval
